problem_text_cn: 隧道A₁B₁长L₁，火车A₂B₂静长L₂（L₂>L₁）。1. 火车匀速v驶进隧道，地面S₁系中A₂与A₁相遇时B₂与B₁也相遇，求v；2. 火车系S₂中求A₁与A₂、B₁与B₂相遇的时间间隔Δt₂；3. 隧道A₁端封闭、B₁端有大门，S₁系中关闭大门装入火车，S₂系中假设带动事件以速度u从A₂传递到B₂，确定u的可取值并证明u≤c（用β=v/c表述）。
problem_text_en: Tunnel A₁B₁ has length L₁，train A₂B₂ has rest length L₂（L₂>L₁）。1. The train moves into the tunnel at uniform speed v，A₂ meets A₁ and B₂ meets B₁ simultaneously in the ground frame S₁，find v；2. Find the time interval Δt₂ between A₁ meeting A₂ and B₁ meeting B₂ in the train frame S₂；3. Tunnel end A₁ is closed and end B₁ has a gate，the gate is closed to load the train in frame S₁，assuming the driving event propagates from A₂ to B₂ at speed u in frame S₂，determine the possible values of u and prove u≤c（expressed in β=v/c）.
problem_solution_cn:
（1）火车速度v：
- S₁系中火车动长L₂'=L₂√(1-β²)，由L₂'=L₁，解得v=c√(1-(L₁/L₂)²)。
（2）时间间隔Δt₂：
- S₂系中隧道动长L₁'=L₁²/L₂，Δt₂=(L₂-L₁')/v=L₂√(1-(L₁/L₂)²)/c。
（3）u的取值与证明：
- 要求uΔt₂≤L₂，得u≤c/√(1-(L₁/L₂)²)=c²/v；
- 反证法：假设u>c，选取L₂使v=c/α（α>1），则u>c²/v=αc>c，与u≤c²/v矛盾，故u≤c。
problem_solution_en:
（1）Train speed v：
- The moving length of the train in frame S₁ is L₂'=L₂√(1-β²)，from L₂'=L₁，solving gives v=c√(1-(L₁/L₂)²)。
（2）Time interval Δt₂：
- The moving length of the tunnel in frame S₂ is L₁'=L₁²/L₂，Δt₂=(L₂-L₁')/v=L₂√(1-(L₁/L₂)²)/c。
（3）Possible values of u and proof：
- Requiring uΔt₂≤L₂，obtaining u≤c/√(1-(L₁/L₂)²)=c²/v；
- Proof by contradiction：Assume u>c，select L₂ such that v=c/α（α>1），then u>c²/v=αc>c，contradicting u≤c²/v，thus u≤c。
problem_answer: 1. 火车速度$v=c \sqrt{1-\left(\frac{L_1}{L_2}\right)^2}$；2. 时间间隔$\Delta t_2=\frac{L_2 \sqrt{1-\left(\frac{L_1}{L_2}\right)^2}}{c}$；3. u的取值范围$u \leq \frac{c^2}{v}$，证明见解析
